description_long: This is a single-story suburban house surrounded by a well-landscaped yard featuring a curved driveway, clusters of trees, and a small pond. The house has a dark gable roof, light-colored exterior walls, and several large windows, providing a modern yet cozy appearance. The front yard is bordered by a semicircle of mature trees, while the backyard is enclosed by a fence and contains additional greenery. A paved driveway leads to a garage attached to the side of the house, and a main entryway is visible at the front, flanked by shrubs and a small porch. The property includes a mix of deciduous and coniferous trees, with a distinct separation between the manicured lawn and a denser wooded area. Outdoor seating and a small patio area are also present, enhancing the home's livability and curb appeal.
description: A modern single-story house with a dark gable roof, large windows, and a landscaped yard featuring a curved driveway, trees, and a pond. The property includes a garage, fenced backyard, and outdoor seating areas.
description_view_0: The house is seen from above the front, showing the curved driveway, main entryway, and a semicircle of trees leading to the front door.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the garage, fenced backyard, and the transition from manicured lawn to wooded area.
description_view_2: The rear of the house is visible, with the backyard, dense cluster of coniferous trees, and patio area standing out.
description_view_3: A direct front view emphasizes the main entryway, curved driveway, and the semicircle of mature trees framing the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and some grouped in pairs
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch, steps, and flanked by shrubs, featuring a single front door and minimal decorative elements.
